attacking_style: Launches long-range kamikaze attacks (10+ km from finish), often solo moves from breakaway or chase groups. Willing to gamble on sustained efforts that force opponents to respond before key climbs or finale.
team_tactics: Given freedom to pursue opportunistic moves even when team already controls classifications. Minimal visible domestique support; operates as autonomous aggressor forcing rivals to commit resources.
terrain_preference: Cobbled Classics suit him best (Top-4 Monument finish, bridged to favorites at Flanders twice). Can handle short punchy climbs but lacks sustained climbing power on steeper gradients.
vulnerability: Cannot sustain long solo efforts when gradients steepen toward finish. Power fades on prolonged climbs after committing to early attacks, allowing chasers to neutralize.
key_patterns: Bridges to elite groups solo in Classics, showing unexpected resilience (2x Flanders evidence)
Launches premature solo attacks 10km+ out that force rival teams to chase
Opportunistic KOM/breakaway hunting even when tactically unnecessary for team
Finishes top-5 in Monument-level bunch sprints, exceeding puncheur expectations
form_trajectory: neutral: showed Monument podium potential in 2020 Flanders but 2021 Poland attack demonstrated persistent weakness sustaining power on climbs
built_from: 2021 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
